# Manoj Mohan

> Senior Software Developer specializing in high-performance data visualization and scalable cloud infrastructure.

## Info
- Homepage: https://manojmohan.dev
- Resume: https://manojmohan.dev/resume.html
- Email: manoj.mohandev@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/manojmohangit
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/manumani07/

## Core Projects
- [Cerber Cloudflare Sync](https://github.com/manojmohangit/cerber-lockout-cloudflare-sync): WordPress plugin that synchronizes IP lockout events to Cloudflare.
- [Maa Saheli](https://maasaheli.manojmohan.dev/): Maternal health connectivity platform built with Flutter and Firebase.
- [Grocery Hub](https://groceryhub.manojmohan.dev/): Intelligent inventory management system built with React and TypeScript.
- [NPM Stats Analyzer](https://manojmohan.dev/compare-npm-download-stats/): High-density data visualization platform for NPM package telemetry.

## Technical Blog Posts

- [Part 1: Pagination](https://manojmohan.dev/blog/rendering-100k-rows-part-1-pagination.html) ([Markdown Source](https://manojmohan.dev/posts/rendering-100k-rows-part-1-pagination.md)): Why the classic pagination approach is still the safest, lowest-overhead way to handle millions of rows.
- [Part 2: DOM Virtualization](https://manojmohan.dev/blog/rendering-100k-rows-part-2-virtualization.html) ([Markdown Source](https://manojmohan.dev/posts/rendering-100k-rows-part-2-virtualization.md)): How to simulate scrolling through millions of records smoothly by recycling a fixed set of DOM nodes.
- [Part 3: Canvas Grids](https://manojmohan.dev/blog/rendering-100k-rows-part-3-canvas.html) ([Markdown Source](https://manojmohan.dev/posts/rendering-100k-rows-part-3-canvas.md)): Why high-performance tools like Figma and Google Sheets bypass the DOM entirely by drawing cells directly onto a 2D Canvas.
- [pnpm Vibe Coding](https://manojmohan.dev/blog/pnpm-vibe-coding.html) ([Markdown Source](https://manojmohan.dev/posts/pnpm-vibe-coding.md)): Navigating dependency trees and package resolution.
